zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues II de Rollancourt於1072年9月5日出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特時，他的父親Hugues Ier DE ROLLANCOURT32歲，母親Berthe de Montcavrel20歲。他和Jeanne de Blingel至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1125年12月13日在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues II de Rollancourt于1072年9月5日出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特时，他的父亲Hugues Ier DE ROLLANCOURT32岁，母亲Berthe de Montcavrel20岁。他和Jeanne de Blingel至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1125年12月13日在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues II de Rollancourt was born on 5 September 1072, in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Hugues Ier DE ROLLANCOURT, was 32 and his mother, Berthe de Montcavrel, was 20. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Jeanne de Blingel. He died on 13 December 1125, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues II de Rollancourt est né le 5 septembre 1072, à Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Hugues Ier DE ROLLANCOURT, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Berthe de Montcavrel, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Jeanne de Blingel. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1125, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues II de Rollancourt am 5. September 1072 in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues Ier DE ROLLANCOURT 32 und seine Mutter Berthe de Montcavrel 20. Er hatte mit Jeanne de Blingel mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Dezember 1125 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues II de Rollancourt è nato il il 5 settembre 1072 nel Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues Ier DE ROLLANCOURT, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Berthe de Montcavrel, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Jeanne de Blingel. Morì il 13 dicembre 1125, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Rollancourtが1072年9月5日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスロランコウルトで生まれた時，父Hugues Ier DE ROLLANCOURTは32歳，母Berthe de Montcavrelは20歳であった。彼はJeanne de Blingelとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1125年12月13日に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Rollancourt(이)가 1072년 9월 5일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 롤랭쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues Ier DE ROLLANCOURT(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Berthe de Montcavrel(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Jeanne de Blingel(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1125년 12월 13일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.5 September 1072–13 December 1125: 5 de setembro de 1072–13 de dezembro de 1125
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues II de Rollancourt nasceu em 5 de setembro de 1072, em Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Hugues Ier DE ROLLANCOURT, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Berthe de Montcavrel, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Jeanne de Blingel. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1125, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues II de Rollancourt родился 5 сентября 1072 г. в местности ролланкоурт, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues Ier DE ROLLANCOURT было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Berthe de Montcavrel, 20. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Jeanne de Blingel. Он умер 13 декабря 1125 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.5 September 1072–13 December 1125: 5 de septiembre de 1072–13 de diciembre de 1125
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues II de Rollancourt nació el 5 de septiembre de 1072, en Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Hugues Ier DE ROLLANCOURT, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Berthe de Montcavrel, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Jeanne de Blingel. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1125, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
